speaker: speaker2
text: No , I'm Korean . Where are you from ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm from America . Are you settling in all right ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I've already found a flat and it's quite comfortable . What about you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I live in my uncle's house . He came here ten years ago .

speaker: speaker2
text: What do you think of the local accent here ? Has it been causing you any problems ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think it's just a matter of getting used to it .
